careers@motivitylabs.com.subject: AI Engineer Internship Interest - Preston Rank
careers@motivitylabs.com.body:
Dear Motivity Labs Team,

My name is Preston Rank, and I'm a Computer Science Junior at the University of Texas at Dallas, graduating in December 2027. I'm reaching out because I'm genuinely impressed by Motivity Labs' focus on 'Innovation as a Service,' particularly your work with cloud-native architectures and generative AI.

As an aspiring AI Engineer, my experience aligns well with your commitment to cutting-edge technology. I'm keen to apply my skills in AI development to real-world projects, especially those involving generative AI, and believe I could make a valuable contribution to your team.

I am very interested in exploring potential internship opportunities at Motivity Labs Inc. and would appreciate the chance to learn more about how I could contribute. My resume, detailing my AI engineering experience, is attached for your review.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Preston Rank
